2604.26923.title: ClassEval-Pro: A Cross-Domain Benchmark for Class-Level Code Generation
2604.26923.paper_summary: LLMs have achieved strong results on both function-level code synthesis and repository-level code modification, yet a capability that falls between these two extremes -- compositional code creation, i.e., building a complete, internally structured class from a specification -- remains underserved. Current evaluations are either confined to isolated functions or rely on manually curated class-level tasks that are expensive to scale and increasingly susceptible to data contamination. We introduce ClassEval-Pro, a benchmark of 300 class-level tasks spanning 11 domains, constructed through an automated three-stage pipeline that combines complexity enhancement, cross-domain class composition, and integration of real-world GitHub code contributed after January 2025. Every task is validated by an LLM Judge Ensemble and must pass test suites with over 90% line coverage. We evaluate five frontier LLMs under five generation strategies. The best model achieves only 45.6% class-level Pass@1, with a 17.7-point gap between the strongest and weakest models, confirming the benchmark's discriminative power. Strategy choice strongly interacts with model capability: structured approaches such as bottom-up improve weaker models by up to 9.4 percentage points, while compositional generation collapses to as low as 1.3%. Error analysis over 500 manually annotated failures reveals that logic errors (56.2%) and dependency errors (38.0%) dominate, identifying cross-method coordination as the core bottleneck.
2604.26923.paper_summary_zh: LLMs 在功能級別的代碼合成和庫級別的代碼修改方面取得了強勁的成果，但介於這兩者之間的能力——組合代碼創建，即從規範構建一個完整的、內部結構化的類——仍然得不到充分的重視。當前的評估要麼僅限於孤立的函數，要麼依賴於手動策劃的類級任務，這些任務在擴展時成本高昂，且越來越容易受到數據污染的影響。我們介紹了 ClassEval-Pro，一個涵蓋 11 個領域的 300 個類級任務的基準，這些任務是通過一個自動化的三階段流程構建的，該流程結合了複雜性增強、跨領域類組合和整合 2025 年 1 月之後貢獻的現實世界 GitHub 代碼。每個任務都經過 LLM 評判團的驗證，並必須通過超過 90% 行覆蓋率的測試套件。我們在五種生成策略下評估了五個前沿 LLM。最佳模型的類級 Pass@1 僅達 45.6%，最強和最弱模型之間的差距為 17.7 個百分點，證實了基準的區分能力。策略選擇與模型能力之間存在強烈的互動：結構化方法如自下而上可使較弱的模型提升最多 9.4 個百分點，而組合生成則低至 1.3%。對 500 個手動標註的失敗案例的錯誤分析顯示，邏輯錯誤（56.2%）和依賴錯誤（38.0%）占主導地位，識別出跨方法協調是核心瓶頸。
2604.26923.author: Yeheng Chen et.al.
2604.26923.authors: Yeheng Chen, Chaoxiang Xie, Yuling Shi, Wenhao Zeng, Yongpan Wang, Hongyu Zhang, Xiaodong Gu
